message:
fix(npm): hooks init now generates npx ruvector commands

The hooks init command now generates settings.json with
npx ruvector hooks instead of ruvector hooks, ensuring
commands work without global installation.

Bumps to v0.1.40

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "ruvector",
-  "version": "0.1.39",
+  "version": "0.1.40",
   "description": "High-performance vector database for Node.js with automatic native/WASM fallback",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "types": "dist/index.d.ts",
